---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea for this project
title: ''
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem

A clear description of the problem or limitation you're experiencing.

## Proposed Solution

Describe the feature or change you'd like to see. For a new numerical method, estimator, or algorithm, please include:

- The published form of the algorithm (formula, recursion, or pseudocode).
- A primary reference (paper, textbook, or arXiv number) with the canonical form.
- The intended precision regime: `double` (transcendentals, MC paths, QMC) or `decimal` (covariance, linear algebra, bootstrap results).
- Any PSD, convergence, stability, or stream-independence guarantees the implementation should provide.

## Alternatives Considered

Any alternative solutions, existing Numerics types, or external packages you've considered and why they don't fit.

## Additional Context

Add any other context, examples, benchmarks, or reference implementations.
